title: Simple Creepers
description: A resource pack makes better creepers!
body:
# Simple creepers
## 1.0

Simple Creepers is a simple and lightweight resource pack that redesigns the creeper's texture to look cleaner, smoother, and more minimal — without changing its iconic shape or style.

This pack is perfect for players who enjoy a more polished and less noisy Minecraft aesthetic. It keeps the vanilla vibe intact while giving the creeper a fresh look that fits beautifully in modern or simplified builds.

Whether you're building a futuristic base, a minimalistic survival world, or just want mobs that blend better with your custom style, Better Creepers is a small touch that can make a big difference.

💥 Doesn’t change models or animations — just the texture!
🔥 Great for performance-friendly, clean visuals.

❓ How to use:
Just drop the .zip file into your resourcepacks folder, enable it in-game, and enjoy!

🧪 Tested on Minecraft 1.21.6
🎨 Resolution: 16x (default)

Made with love by HellonaGR!

Planet minecraft: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/better-creppers/
Youtube (GR): https://www.youtube.com/@HellonaGR
